https://www.bitmex.com/blog/index-weight.title: Now Live: Index Weights Update for Q3 2026
https://www.bitmex.com/blog/index-weight.content:
Now Live: Index Weights Update for Q3 2026
Fri, 26 Jun 2026 12:00:00 GMT
https://www.bitmex.com/blog/index-weights-changes-2026-q3-now-live
A kind reminder that on 26 June 2026 at 12:00 UTC, our index weights were updated at BitMEX. The hypothetical values of indices with their new weights are now published as the “NEXT” index family (e.g. .BXBT_NEXT). Please see our blog for further information. In the meantime, if you have any questions, please contact Support .

Read on for full details on what's changing. Now Live: SPCXUSDT Converted to a Regular Equity Perpetual
Mon, 15 Jun 2026 16:00:00 GMT
https://www.bitmex.com/blog/spcxusdt-conversion-now-live
SPCXUSDT was converted from a pre-IPO perp to a standard equity perpetual as of 16 June 2026 at 12:00 UTC. Mark pricing is now FairPriceStox and funding rates are active. The first period for funding calculation will be from 16 June 2026 at 12:00 UTC to 16 June 2026 (+8h) at 20:00 UTC and the first funding payment will be at 17 June 2026 at 04:00 (+16h) UTC You can trade SPCXUSDT here or view the full updated contract specs here .
